title: [MTR] maimai TRAiN Repaint Pack
description: Resource pack that adds Osaka Metro 400 18m-kit repaints into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
This is a repaint made by gukky, a fan of a famous music game of maimai and maimaiDX.
The graphics from this pack is only used for fan work. For players who wish to play the game should visit maimaiDX arcade made by SEGA.

Link to the original kit:
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/om400_kit
